chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select case when rank_by_product = 1 then ProductName else '' end as "产品",case when rank_by_product = 1 then cast(round(pretaxAmountProduct,3) as varchar) else '' end as "产品总金额" ,  case when rank_by_product_item =1 then item else '' end as "计费项", ListPrice as "单价", round(usage,3) as "使用量",round(coalesce(DeductedByResourcePackage,0)) as "资源包抵扣用量",round(PretaxGrossAmount ,3)as "原始金额",round(InvoiceDiscount,3) as "优惠金额", round(DeductedByCoupons,3) as "优惠券优惠金额",round(DeductedByCashCoupons,3) as "代金券抵扣",round(DeductedByPrepaidCard,3) as "储值卡抵扣" ,round(PaymentAmount,3) as "现金支付",round(OutstandingAmount,3) as "未接清金额",round(PretaxAmount,3) as "应付金额" from(select *, rank() over(partition by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc) as rank_by_product,rank() over(partition by productname,item order by pretaxAmount desc ) as rank_by_product_item  from( select *, sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname) as pretaxAmountProduct,sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname,item) as pretaxAmountItem from (select ProductName, concat(BillingItem , '(',UsageUnit,')') as item, ListPrice, sum(Usage) as usage,sum(DeductedByResourcePackage) as DeductedByResourcePackage, sum(DeductedByCashCoupons) as DeductedByCashCoupons , sum(DeductedByCoupons) as DeductedByCoupons, sum(DeductedByPrepaidCard) as DeductedByPrepaidCard, sum(InvoiceDiscount) as InvoiceDiscount, sum(OutstandingAmount) as OutstandingAmount, sum(PaymentAmount) as PaymentAmount, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount ,sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount  from instance_bill group by productname, item, listprice))) order by PretaxAmountProduct desc,PretaxAmountitem desc, pretaxamount  desc limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select case when rank_by_product = 1 then ProductName else '' end as "产品",case when rank_by_product = 1 then cast(round(pretaxAmountProduct,3) as varchar) else '' end as "产品总金额" ,  case when rank_by_product_item =1 then item else '' end as "计费项", ListPrice as "单价", round(usage,3) as "使用量",round(coalesce(DeductedByResourcePackage,0)) as "资源包抵扣用量",round(PretaxGrossAmount ,3)as "原始金额",round(InvoiceDiscount,3) as "优惠金额", round(DeductedByCoupons,3) as "优惠券优惠金额",round(DeductedByCashCoupons,3) as "代金券抵扣",round(DeductedByPrepaidCard,3) as "储值卡抵扣" ,round(PaymentAmount,3) as "现金支付",round(OutstandingAmount,3) as "未接清金额",round(PretaxAmount,3) as "应付金额" from(select *, rank() over(partition by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc) as rank_by_product,rank() over(partition by productname,item order by pretaxAmount desc ) as rank_by_product_item  from( select *, sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname) as pretaxAmountProduct,sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname,item) as pretaxAmountItem from (select ProductName, concat(BillingItem , '(',UsageUnit,')') as item, ListPrice, sum(Usage) as usage,sum(DeductedByResourcePackage) as DeductedByResourcePackage, sum(DeductedByCashCoupons) as DeductedByCashCoupons , sum(DeductedByCoupons) as DeductedByCoupons, sum(DeductedByPrepaidCard) as DeductedByPrepaidCard, sum(InvoiceDiscount) as InvoiceDiscount, sum(OutstandingAmount) as OutstandingAmount, sum(PaymentAmount) as PaymentAmount, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount ,sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount  from instance_bill group by productname, item, listprice))) order by PretaxAmountProduct desc,PretaxAmountitem desc, pretaxamount  desc limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query:
* |
select
  productname as "付费类型",
  round(diffreal [1], 3) as "折后费用(元)",
    cast(
      round(diffreal [1] / sum(diffreal [1]) over() * 100, 2) as varchar
    ) as "占比",
    cast(round(diffreal [3] * 100 -100, 2) as varchar)as "同比上月(折后费用)",
  round(diffgross [1], 3) as "原始消费(元)",
    cast(round(diffgross [3] * 100 -100, 2) as varchar)as "同比上月(原始消费)",
  (days) as "消费趋势"
from(
    select
      productname,
      compare(pretaxamount, 2592000) as diffreal,
      compare(PretaxGrossAmount, 2592000) as diffgross,
      arbitrary(days) as days
    from(
        select
          productname,
          sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount,
          sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount,
          array_agg(PretaxAmount) as days
        from(
            select
              SubscriptionType as ProductName,
              sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount,
              sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount,
              date_trunc('day', __time__) as t
            FROM              instance_bill
            group by
              SubscriptionType,
              t
            order by
              t
          )
        group by
          productname
      )
    group by
      productname
  )
order by
  diffreal [1] desc
limit
  1000

  (days) as "消费趋势"
from(

      productname,

      compare(PretaxGrossAmount, 2592000) as diffgross,
      arbitrary(days) as days
    from(
        select
          productname,
          sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount,
          sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount,
          array_agg(PretaxAmount) as days
        from(
            select
              SubscriptionType as ProductName,
              sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount,
              sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount,
              date_trunc('day', __time__) as t
            FROM              instance_bill
            group by
              SubscriptionType,
              t
            order by
              t
          )
        group by
          productname
      )
    group by
      productname
  )
order by
  diffreal [1] desc
limit
  1000

basicOptions.displayName: 异常账单时间点，点击产品名称查看右详情

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select name as "异常产品名称", date_format(from_unixtime(r.t),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as "异常时间点",round(r.d,3) as "实际费用", round(r.pred,3) as "预期正常费用", round( r.pred-r.d,3) as "异常差额" from(select res.name,filter(cast(zip(res.ts, res.probs,res.ds,res.preds) as array(row(t double, prob double, d double, pred double))), r -> r.prob >=1) as anormly from ( select ts_anomaly_filter(cast(ProductCode as varchar), res[1], res[2], res[3], res[6], 100, 0) as res from ( select ProductCode, array_transpose(ts_predicate_arma(time, num, 5, 1, 1)) as res from ( select time, ProductCode, num from( select time,map_concat(m, map(diff,transform(diff, x -> 0)))all from( select time,m,array_except(all_keys,map_keys(m)) as diff from( select time, map_agg(ProductCode, num) as m , arbitrary(all_keys) as all_keys from( select time, ProductCode, num, filter(array_distinct(array_agg(ProductCode) over()),x -> x is not null) as all_keys from( select to_unixtime(time) as time , productcode,num from(select (time_series(__time__,'1d','%Y-%m-%d','0')) as time, ProductCode , sum(pretaxamount) as num from instance_bill group by time, ProductCode order by time ))) group by time))), unnest(all) as t(ProductCode,num)) group by ProductCode ) )), unnest(anormly) as t(r) order by r.t desc
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select name as "异常产品名称", date_format(from_unixtime(r.t),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as "异常时间点",round(r.d,3) as "实际费用", round(r.pred,3) as "预期正常费用", round( r.pred-r.d,3) as "异常差额" from(select res.name,filter(cast(zip(res.ts, res.probs,res.ds,res.preds) as array(row(t double, prob double, d double, pred double))), r -> r.prob >=1) as anormly from ( select ts_anomaly_filter(cast(ProductCode as varchar), res[1], res[2], res[3], res[6], 100, 0) as res from ( select ProductCode, array_transpose(ts_predicate_arma(time, num, 5, 1, 1)) as res from ( select time, ProductCode, num from( select time,map_concat(m, map(diff,transform(diff, x -> 0)))all from( select time,m,array_except(all_keys,map_keys(m)) as diff from( select time, map_agg(ProductCode, num) as m , arbitrary(all_keys) as all_keys from( select time, ProductCode, num, filter(array_distinct(array_agg(ProductCode) over()),x -> x is not null) as all_keys from( select to_unixtime(time) as time , productcode,num from(select (time_series(__time__,'1d','%Y-%m-%d','0')) as time, ProductCode , sum(pretaxamount) as num from instance_bill group by time, ProductCode order by time ))) group by time))), unnest(all) as t(ProductCode,num)) group by ProductCode ) )), unnest(anormly) as t(r) order by r.t desc

search.query: *| select ts_predicate_arma(time, num, 5, 1, 1) from ( select to_unixtime(time) as time, num from( select (time_series(__time__,'1d','%Y-%m-%d','0')) as time , sum(pretaxamount) as num from instance_bill where ProductCode='oss' group by time order by time)) limit 10000
search.tokenQuery: ProductCode:${name}| select ts_predicate_arma(time, num, 5, 1, 1) from ( select to_unixtime(time) as time, num from( select (time_series(__time__,'1d','%Y-%m-%d','0')) as time , sum(pretaxamount) as num from log group by time order by time)) limit 10000

tokenQueryMap.0: *| select ts_predicate_arma(time, num, 5, 1, 1) from ( select to_unixtime(time) as time, num from( select (time_series(__time__,'1d','%Y-%m-%d','0')) as time , sum(pretaxamount) as num from instance_bill where ProductCode='${{name|oss}}' group by time order by time)) limit 10000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query:
* |
select
  productname as "产品名称",
  round(diffreal [1], 3) as "折后费用(元)",
    cast(
      round(diffreal [1] / sum(diffreal [1]) over() * 100, 2) as varchar
    )as "产品费用占比",
    cast(
      coalesce(round(diffreal [5] * 100 -100), 2) as varchar
    )as "同比-1天",
    cast(
      round(coalesce(diffreal [6] * 100 -100, 2)) as varchar
    ) as "同比-2天",
    cast(
      round(coalesce(diffreal [7] * 100 -100), 2) as varchar
    ) as "同比-3天"
from(
    select
      productname,
      compare(pretaxamount, 86400, 172800, 259200) as diffreal
    from(
        select
          productname,
          sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount,
          sum(PretaxGrossAmount)
        FROM          instance_bill
        group by
          productname
      )
    group by
      productname
  )
order by
  diffreal [1] desc
limit
  1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query:
*|
select
  productname as "产品名称",
  round(diffreal [1], 3) as "折后费用(元)",
    cast(
      round(diffreal [1] / sum(diffreal [1]) over() * 100, 2) as varchar
    ) as "产品费用占比",
    cast(round(diffreal [3] * 100 -100, 2) as varchar) as "同比上月(折后费用)",
  round(diffgross [1], 3) as "原始消费(元)",
    cast(round(diffgross [3] * 100 -100, 2) as varchar) as "同比上月(原始消费)",
  (days) as "30天费用趋势"
from(
    select
      productname,
      compare(pretaxamount, 2592000) as diffreal,
      compare(PretaxGrossAmount, 2592000) as diffgross,
      arbitrary(days) as days
    from(
        select
          productname,
          sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount,
          sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount,
          array_agg(pretaxAmount) as days
        from(

              productname,

              sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount,
              date_trunc('day', __time__) as t
            FROM              instance_bill
            group by
              productname,
              t
            order by
              t
          )
        group by
          productname
      )
    group by
      productname
  )
order by
  diffreal [1] desc
limit
  1000
